etymology.description: 髟(髟) (biāo, 'hair') + 加(加) (jiā, 'add') = combines with 加 as phonetic element
etymology.interpretation: The character 𣬉 is composed of the component 髟(髟) (biāo, 'hair') which suggests a relation to hair or a similar idea, and 加(加) (jiā, 'add') functioning as the phonetic component. This indicates 𣬉 is used for its sound, likely in a word related to hair.
